methodology.canonicalisation_notes: REZ names vary across sources (e.g. "Central-West Orana", "Central -West Orana", "nsw-central-west-orana"). The exporter normalises via REZ_CANONICAL in pipeline/exporters/export_rez_pipeline.py. New variants must be added there. The "Issac" typo in IASR is mapped to "isaac".
